5 
I INTRODUCTION 
I.1 Product name  
medsea_omi_tempsal_sst_area_averaged_anomalies 
This OMI product includes unfiltered SST anomaly, given as monthly mean time 
series starting on 1982 and averaged over the Mediterranean Sea, and filtered 
SST anomaly (Tt), obtained by using the X11 -seasonal adjustment procedure.  
Anomalies are computed against the 1991-2020 reference period. 
 
medsea_omi_tempsal_sst_trend 
This OMI product includes the cumulative/net trend map for the 
Mediterranean Sea over the period, i.e. the rate of change of SST (°C/year) 
scaled by the number of time steps (namely, the number of years). Trend 
computation is based on X-11 seasonal adjustment procedure. 
I.2 Indicator evaluation method 
The Mediterranean Sea (MEDSEA) Sea Surface Temperature (SST) Ocean 
Monitoring Indicators (OMIs) are derived from the CMEMS Reprocessed 
Mediterranean L4 (MED-REP-L4) SST product and its update runs in parallel with 
the corresponding MED-REP-L4 update. The MED-REP-L4 product provides the 
SSTs that are used to compute all the Mediterranean SST OMIs, i.e. the time 
series of SST anomalies (unfiltered and filtered, 
medsea_omi_tempsal_sst_area_averaged_anomalies) and the 2D map of SST 
trend (medsea_omi_tempsal_sst_trend). Anomalies are computed against the 
1991-2020 reference period. The 30 -year climatology 1991 -2020
